creator: jpb@jimby.name
text:
(In reply to Mark Linimon from comment #0)

I have reached out to Deb Goodkin to help collect some remembrances of Mike Karels. When she gets back to me I'll prepare a patch.

Separately, I've reached out to Drew Gallatin for permission to use part of his remembrance published on the FreeBSD Forum for Hans Petter Selasky.

Once that is finalized I'll prepare a second patch.

Jim B.
